entry.data:
CLEAR
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
